name: Productive Work with AI Agents
description: A practical course on collaborating with AI coding agents — how to set them up, hand off work, catch their mistakes, and ship faster than you would alone.

pages.name: Welcome
pages.description: What this course covers and how to get the most out of it.

pages.name: Goals and Constraints
pages.description: How to brief an agent so it makes the trade-offs you would.

pages.name: What is an AI Agent?
pages.description: Definition, what separates an agent from a chatbot, and why the distinction matters.

pages.name: Choose the Right Model
pages.description: Picking a model that matches the task — accuracy, speed, cost, context size.

pages.name: Tool Use Fundamentals
pages.description: Giving the agent hands: tools, schemas, and when to add a new one.

pages.name: Designing Agent Prompts
pages.description: Prompt structure that survives long sessions and weird inputs.

pages.name: Errors and Retries
pages.description: Letting the agent recover from a stumble without spiraling.

pages.name: Memory and Context
pages.description: What to keep in the prompt, what to retrieve, and what to write down.

pages.name: Evaluating an Agent
pages.description: How to tell if your changes made the agent better or just different.

pages.name: Best Practices
pages.description: Habits that compound: small commits, tight loops, honest reviews.

pages.name: Working in a Team
pages.description: Using agents on a team — shared rules, review handoffs, and keeping context visible to others.
